changed.title: google-vertex: Missing gemini-3.1-flash-lite in provider catalog causes silent failure instead of error

ambiguity.why_not_hard: The title and root-cause analysis directly identify the provider catalog gap and fallback/agent-runner silent failure.

per_label_rationale.agent_runtime: The failure occurs in the embedded agent runner and model fallback loop, causing the agent run to produce no reply.
per_label_rationale.model_releases: The issue centers on adding/supporting a specific newly available Gemini model ID, gemini-3.1-flash-lite.
per_label_rationale.model_serving: The Google Vertex provider catalog/model selection layer is missing the model and raises model_not_found.
per_label_rationale.reliability: A known failover/model_not_found error is swallowed, resulting in silent failure instead of fallback or a user-facing error.

excluded_label_rationale.chat_integrations: Discord is only the observed channel; the root issue is provider catalog and agent fallback behavior, not Discord integration.

pass2_vs_pass1.title: google-vertex: Missing gemini-3.1-flash-lite in provider catalog causes silent failure instead of error
